Defines the Boolean.prototype object and its properties and routines for the JerryScript engine.

# Purpose
This code is a C header file that defines the properties and routines for the `Boolean.prototype` object in the ECMAScript engine. It uses macros to declare the object identifier and its properties, such as `OBJECT_ID` for the `ECMA_BUILTIN_ID_BOOLEAN_PROTOTYPE`. The file specifies object properties using the `OBJECT_VALUE` macro, including the constructor property with the identifier `LIT_MAGIC_STRING_CONSTRUCTOR`. It also defines routine properties using the `ROUTINE` macro, which includes the `toString` and `valueOf` methods, represented by `LIT_MAGIC_STRING_TO_STRING_UL` and `LIT_MAGIC_STRING_VALUE_OF_UL`, respectively. The macros are undefined at the end of the file to prevent conflicts with other code.
